Notice Of Motion Of Cross-Defendant Harriman To Set Aside Default On Reat Holdings Inc.'S Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Cross-defendant Stephanie Harriman's motion to set aside the default taken against her on the cross-complaint of Reat Holdings, Inc. is granted. Ms. Harriman is entitled to have the default vacated per the discretionary relief provisions of CCP 473(b) and doing so comports with the strong policy favoring resolution of disputes on their merits. Reat's request that Ms. Harriman be required to pay its legal fees relating to this motion is denied. Courtesy, efficient resolution of disputes and lack of prejudice strongly indicate that Reat should not have sought entry of default when it did and, once it did, should have agreed to it being set aside. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/HK)
